pages.name: PU-01 Home Page (Full)

children.name: HeroTitle
children.text: How would you like to coordinate?

children.text: AI-powered agents for scheduling, feedback, and coordination automation

children.text: Visual heatmap showing participant time overlap

children.name: FD-Feedback

pages.name: PU-02 Calendar (Full Admin)
pages.description: Calendar page with heatmap, settings expanded, learner guide, action menu, all controls

children.name: GuideBody
children.text: 1. Name your event above  2. Set your preferred time range  3. Mark your own availability on the grid  4. Share the invite link with participants  5. Review heatmap when everyone has responded

children.name: SkipInfo
children.text: Sat, Sun are skipped (grayed out on grid)

pages.name: PU-03 Meeting Side Panel
pages.description: Left panel open with all meeting config: duration, Google Meet, Zoom, Luma, recurrence expanded

pages.name: PU-04 AI Calendar Panel
pages.description: Right AI panel with chat, suggestion chips, sentiment grid expanded, system prompt visible

children.name: SL-Mark me av
children.text: Mark me available except where I am busy

children.name: UT1
children.text: Set hours to business hours and skip weekends

children.name: AT1
children.text: Done! I have set the time range to 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM and skipped Saturday and Sunday. The calendar grid has been updated.

children.name: SPBody
children.text: You are an AI calendar assistant. Help the user configure their coordination calendar. Available actions: setTimeRange, skipDays, setInterval, renameEvent...

children.name: UT2
children.text: Call it Weekly Standup and make it public

children.name: AT2
children.text: Updated! Calendar renamed to "Weekly Standup" and visibility set to public. Anyone with the link can now join.

pages.name: PU-05 Announcements Compose
pages.description: Full compose form with AI context, channels table, poll expanded, schedule, preview

children.name: AiContextBody
children.text: Calendar: "Weekly Team Standup" with 5 participants. 2 confirmed meetings. Recurrence: weekly on Wednesday.

children.name: DmLabel
children.text: Respect DM opt-out preferences (2 users opted out)

children.name: GSDesc

children.text: When off, only admins can see your email

pages.name: PU-11 Feedback (Full Admin)
pages.description: Submit form, filters, expanded item with admin response, status buttons, sentiment, AI tab

children.name: FBI1Title
children.text: Feature Request: Export calendar data as CSV

children.name: FBI2Title
children.text: Timezone display is confusing in calendar grid

children.name: FBI2Meta
children.text: Alice - Mar 12, 2026 - UX Improvement - Source: Web App

children.name: FBI2Text
children.text: The timezone labels on the calendar grid are hard to read. They overlap with the time labels and the contrast is too low. Also, when switching between timezones, the grid does not immediately update.

children.name: ARInfo
children.text: Previous response by Tevo on Mar 13: "Thanks for the report, looking into this."

children.name: FBI3Title
children.text: Add dark mode toggle to landing page

children.name: AIFBDesc
children.text: Rate AI responses across conversations to improve model behavior

children.name: AIFBQ
children.text: Q: "Set my availability to business hours" - Calendar AI

children.name: AIFBA
children.text: A: "Done! Time range set to 9:00-17:00 and weekends skipped."

pages.name: PU-12 Events Calendar
pages.description: Weekly grid with events, details panel expanded, Google sync picker, overflow popover, network filter

children.name: EvDescText
children.text: Monthly governance review meeting to discuss proposals, vote on catalyst funding, and review community metrics.

children.name: SyncDesc
children.text: Select calendars to add this event:

pages.name: PU-13 Events Discovery
pages.description: All 4 collapsible sections expanded with cards, search, month filter, learner guide

children.name: GuideText
children.text: Browse active and public coordination calendars. Create your own calendar to start coordinating with your group. Past calendars are kept for reference and can be reactivated.

pages.name: PU-14 AI Chat
pages.description: Full AI chat with status banner, system prompt expanded, sentiment feedback expanded, messages, clear

children.name: AlertText
children.text: AI responses are generated using GPT-4o. Please verify important information independently.

children.name: SPBody
children.text: You are an AI assistant for the Coordination Manager platform. Help users with scheduling, announcements, feedback, and general coordination questions. You have access to calendar data, meeting records, and public event information. Always be helpful and concise.

children.name: UT1
children.text: What are the upcoming meetings for this week?

children.name: AT1
children.text:
You have 2 meetings this week:
1. Group A - Wed 10:00-12:00 (Weekly)
2. Group B - Thu 14:00-16:00 (Biweekly)
Both are confirmed with Google Meet links.

children.name: UT2
children.text: Send a reminder to all participants of Group A

children.name: AT2
children.text: I have drafted a reminder announcement for the Group A meeting (Wed 10:00-12:00). I can send it via Discord #general and DM to all 5 participants. Would you like me to proceed?

children.name: AT3
children.text: Sent! Reminder delivered to #general and 5 DMs (2 opted out of DMs). All deliveries successful.

pages.name: PU-15 Guardian Dashboard + Config

children.name: FRM-0
children.text: Hey check out this [suspicious link removed]

children.text: Flag users sending identical messages rapidly

children.name: RD-Invite Spam
children.text: Block discord.gg invite links from non-admins

children.name: CRD-Toxicity Detection
children.text: Use AI to detect toxic language
